Project.NAME: pdf-compressor-extension
Project.keywords: PDF, compression, browser-extension, chrome-extension, vue, typescript, wxt, pdf-lib, client-side, privacy, local-processing
Project.annotation: PDF Compressor Extension - браузерное расширение для локального сжатия PDF файлов без отправки на сервер. Использует pdf.js для рендеринга страниц и pdf-lib для создания оптимизированного PDF. Обеспечивает конфиденциальность данных - все операции выполняются локально в браузере.

M-SIDEPANEL.NAME: SidePanel
M-SIDEPANEL.purpose: Main UI entry point - side panel with compression controls

fn-App.PURPOSE: Main Vue application component with compression workflow

M-BACKGROUND.NAME: Background
M-BACKGROUND.purpose: Background service worker for extension lifecycle

M-COMPRESSION.NAME: CompressionEngine
M-COMPRESSION.purpose: Core PDF compression logic using pdf.js and pdf-lib

fn-compressPDF.PURPOSE: Main compression pipeline - renders pages and creates optimized PDF

fn-renderPage.PURPOSE: Renders PDF page to canvas for compression

fn-createOptimizedPDF.PURPOSE: Creates new PDF with compressed images using pdf-lib

M-FILEHANDLER.NAME: FileHandler
M-FILEHANDLER.purpose: File validation, reading and download operations

fn-validateFile.PURPOSE: Validates PDF file type and constraints

fn-readFile.PURPOSE: Reads file as ArrayBuffer for processing

fn-downloadFile.PURPOSE: Triggers browser download of compressed file

M-STATE.NAME: StateManager
M-STATE.purpose: Application state management for compression workflow

fn-createStateManager.PURPOSE: Creates reactive state for compression process

M-ERROR.NAME: ErrorHandler
M-ERROR.purpose: Centralized error handling and user-friendly error messages

fn-getErrorMessage.PURPOSE: Extracts readable error message from error codes

M-TYPES.NAME: Types
M-TYPES.purpose: TypeScript type definitions for the entire application

enum-CompressionState.PURPOSE: State machine states for compression workflow

M-UI-SELECTOR.NAME: CompressionLevelSelector
M-UI-SELECTOR.purpose: UI component for selecting compression preset

M-LIB-UTILS.NAME: LibUtils
M-LIB-UTILS.purpose: Shared utility functions for library configuration

fn-cn.PURPOSE: Class name merger utility for Tailwind
